PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then conda run -n shiny ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; conda run -n shiny ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'src/instream/.*\.py$'; then MODULE=$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .py); TEST=$(dirname "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | sed 's|.*instream-py/||'); TESTFILE="tests/test_${MODULE}.py"; if [ -f "$TESTFILE" ]; then conda run -n shiny python -m pytest "$TESTFILE" -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; fi; true

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key|secret)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit sensitive file'; exit 1; fi; true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(^|/)(\.env|credentials|secrets)'; then echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit sensitive file'; exit 1; fi; true
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(__pycache__|\.benchmarks|\.hypothesis|\.lock$)'; then echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit generated/cached file'; exit 1; fi; true
